verses.text: Each man camps by his own standard, around the tabernacle. The standards. Order marks God's camp.
Each man camps by his own standard, around the tabernacle. The standards. Order marks God's camp.
On the east side, Judah's camp is pitched, and sets out first. East. Judah leads the march.

On the south side, Reuben's camp is pitched. South. Reuben's side is set.

The tabernacle and the Levites go in the midst of the camps. In the midst. God dwells at the centre.
On the west side, Ephraim's camp is pitched. West. Ephraim's side is set.

On the north side, Dan's camp is pitched, and goes last. North. Dan's side is set.

All are numbered and camp and journey as the LORD commanded. Ordered. The whole camp is arrayed by God's word.
